steps.title: Identify the speaker's core request
steps.content: The speaker asks the ocean to rock me to sleep and make his soothing slumberous lullaby. To rock someone to sleep is to soothe them into a peaceful state — the passage reveals the speaker's fundamental desire for the ocean to impart inner tranquility.

steps.title: Determine the passage's main purpose
steps.content:
The passage conveys the speaker's longing for the ocean to impart inner tranquility through its soothing motion and gentle sounds. Choice C states this exactly. The other choices either misidentify an intensifying emotional arc (A), shift the focus to escape from hardship rather than the tranquility itself (B), or misread the speaker's emotional tone as hesitant rather than desirous (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
